name: Ellis County Teachers and Employees
description_short: Ellis County Teachers & Employees FCU is a member-owned federal credit union serving educators and employees in the Waxahachie, TX area with savings accounts, auto loans, and community-focused financial services.
description_long:
Ellis County Teachers & Employees Federal Credit Union is a not-for-profit, member-owned financial institution serving teachers, employees, and their families in Ellis County, Texas. The credit union has established itself as a community-focused alternative to traditional banks, emphasizing member relationships over volume-based banking practices. Operating from their physical location at 630 N Gibson in Waxahachie, TX 75165, the institution has maintained a local presence while offering digital banking conveniences through their website and online platform. Founded on the principle that members are individuals, not account numbers, the credit union prioritizes personalized service and member financial stability.

Ellis County Teachers & Employees FCU provides a core range of financial products and services typical of community credit unions. Their offerings include savings accounts with current rates of 1.50%, auto loans (both new vehicles at rates as low as 6.00% and used vehicles at rates as low as 6.99%), and online banking access. The credit union provides loan calculators to help members estimate costs, rate transparency through their featured rates page, and multiple contact channels including phone, email, and fax support during business hours. Members can access all products and services both online and at the physical branch location.

What distinguishes Ellis County Teachers & Employees FCU is its membership-focused mission and explicit commitment to supporting the local Ellis County community. The credit union has positioned itself as a partner in members' long-term financial success and community economic growth, rather than simply processing transactions. Their emphasis on personalized member service and the availability of all services at a physical location differentiates them from purely digital-only lenders. The institution's focus on educators and employees reflects a specialized membership base with predictable income patterns.

The credit union operates within NCUA insurance protections and standard credit union frameworks. However, the website content is limited in detail regarding full product offerings beyond basic auto loans and savings accounts. The posted rates (6.00%-6.99% for auto loans, 1.50% for savings) should be verified as current and may not represent the most competitive market rates. Prospective members should contact the institution directly for complete product details, membership eligibility requirements, and current rate offerings not displayed on the website.
services: New auto loans with rates as low as 6.00%
Used auto loans with rates as low as 6.99%
Rate transparency and featured rates page
In-person branch banking at 630 N Gibson, Waxahachie, TX 75165
pros: Member-owned, not-for-profit structure with NCUA insurance protection
Competitive auto loan rates starting at 6.00% for new vehicles and 6.99% for used vehicles
Physical branch location at 630 N Gibson, Waxahachie, TX for in-person service
Online banking and digital services available alongside branch banking
Multiple contact methods: phone (972) 937-4560, email (ectefcu@ectisp.net), and fax support
Loan calculator tool available on website for member financial planning
Community-focused mission with explicit commitment to member and local economic stability
cons: Website provides minimal product details beyond auto loans and savings accounts; unclear if additional products (credit cards, personal loans, share certificates) are available
Limited information about membership eligibility criteria and whether non-teachers/employees can join
Savings account rate of 1.50% is not competitive with current high-yield savings alternatives (typically 4-5% in current market)
Website does not display business hours, making it unclear when branch and phone support are available
No information about minimum account balances, membership fees, or other account requirements
best_for: Teachers and school employees in Ellis County, Texas seeking community-focused financial services
Local residents interested in supporting a member-owned credit union with personal relationship banking
Borrowers seeking auto financing with rates below typical bank offerings
Community members preferring in-person banking at a local physical location
diagnosis: Ellis County Teachers & Employees FCU is best suited for educators, school employees, and Ellis County residents who value community banking relationships and local service over online-only convenience. The primary caveat is that the website reveals only limited product offerings (auto loans and savings); prospective members must contact the credit union directly to confirm full service availability, current rates, and membership eligibility requirements before opening accounts.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
